title: CLOTHING SERVICES - 211info
text: PROFESSIONAL WOMEN'S CLOTHES CLOSET CLOTHING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides shoes and clothing for women seeking professional apparel for work. Clothing donations accepted. 14700 SE Rupert Drive Oak Grove, OR 97267 Eligibility: Women in need of clothing and shoes Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-3pm Email (503) 654-3161 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Church Secretary (503) 654-3161 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Just north of Oak Grove Boulevard, several blocks west of McLoughlin Boulevard, and 2 blocks east of River Road. Near TriMet bus line 33. Services: Clothing Donation Programs Shoes * Women Work Clothing * Women If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
